playbook.intent: An inbound or warm-intro lead message arrives. Done = within 24h, either a qualifying reply with a calendar link, or a polite decline-and-refer.
playbook.scope: An inbound or warm-intro lead message arrives. Done = within 24h, either a qualifying reply with a calendar link, or a polite decline-and-refer.

success-criteria.criterion: Read & qualify stage complete: Triage decision
Exit artifact reviewed and accepted by operator.

stage.name: Read & qualify
stage.intent: Within 30 min: decide reply / refer / decline.

tasks.task: Scan signal: company, role, ask, urgency

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with triage outcome in writing.

stage.name: Reply
stage.intent: Within 24h: send reply that either books a call or politely declines + refers.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when reply is sent within 24h of inbound.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']
{human: faion get-content cold-lead-inbound-reply --format md, agent: faion get-content cold-lead-inbound-reply --format context, json: faion get-content cold-lead-inbound-reply --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
